message:
feat(git): implement git branch detection module

Add new src/git.rs module for reliable git branch detection:

- Primary method: git branch --show-current command
- Fallback: Read .git/HEAD file directly
- Detached HEAD handling with commit hash retrieval
- Per-directory thread-local caching with 30s TTL
- Support for git worktrees and submodules

Public API:
- get_current_branch() -> Option<String>
- get_branch_info() -> BranchInfo
- get_branch_info_at_path(path) -> BranchInfo
- is_in_git_repo() -> bool
- is_in_git_repo_at_path(path) -> bool
- clear_cache()

Bead: git_safety_guard-p2ht [E8-T1]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
